name: Ancient Gear Dark Golem
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>古代の機械暗黒巨人</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>アンティーク・ギアダークゴーレム</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: This card's name becomes "Ancient Gear Golem" while on the field or in the GY. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add up to 2 cards ("Ancient Gear" cards and/or "Geartown") from your Deck to your hand, except "Ancient Gear Dark Golem", then discard 1 card, also you cannot Set cards for the rest of this turn. You can only use this effect of "Ancient Gear Dark Golem" once per turn. If this card attacks, your opponent cannot activate Spell/Trap Cards until the end of the Damage Step.
mnst_eff: This card's name becomes "Ancient Gear Golem" while on the field or in the GY. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add up to 2 cards ("Ancient Gear" cards and/or "Geartown") from your Deck to your hand, except "Ancient Gear Dark Golem", then discard 1 card, also you cannot Set cards for the rest of this turn. You can only use this effect of "Ancient Gear Dark Golem" once per turn. If this card attacks, your opponent cannot activate Spell/Trap Cards until the end of the Damage Step.

stat_change: Changes own name while on the field
Changes own name while in the GY
mst: Prevents activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Prevents activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
